summary: Institutional demand pushed crypto funds higher, but caution lingers as markets looked toward the April FOMC decision for direction.

title: Sui-Based Volo Protocol Hit by $3.5M Exploit, Freezes Vaults to Contain Damage
summary: An attempt to bridge 19.6 WBTC away was intercepted and blocked by the protocol, thereby removing the assets from the attacker's control.
